brand.name: eyedeaz
brand.tagline: Modern branding, websites, and growth-focused digital experiences for businesses ready to stand out.

hero.title: We build modern brands, websites, and digital experiences that turn attention into customers.
hero.description: eyedeaz helps ambitious businesses launch polished digital experiences with clean design, strong messaging, mobile-first performance, and conversion-focused structure.

socialProof: Ads and content that support growth

services.title: Branding and Visual Identity
services.summary: Sharper brand direction for businesses that need to look professional, memorable, and ready to compete.

services.title: Websites and Progressive Web Apps
services.summary: Fast, installable, mobile-first websites that combine polished design with strong usability and lead capture.

services.title: Social Media and Campaign Content
services.summary: Creative assets and marketing visuals designed to make your business look stronger across social, web, and ads.

services.title: Digital Strategy and Conversion Support
services.summary: Practical guidance for businesses that need cleaner messaging, better structure, and stronger calls to action.

caseStudies.title: Business Launch Presence
caseStudies.summary: A complete launch-ready presence for a growing business that needed branding, website clarity, and a stronger first impression.

caseStudies.title: Mobile-First Service Site
caseStudies.summary: A service business experience designed for faster mobile browsing, stronger credibility, and easier contact conversion.

caseStudies.title: Campaign Content Refresh
caseStudies.summary: Refocused a brand's digital content into a cleaner system for social media, paid campaigns, and website consistency.

about.headline: We make businesses look sharper, feel more credible, and convert with more confidence.
about.description: eyedeaz blends brand thinking, UX structure, and modern web execution to create digital experiences that are clean, persuasive, and built to move customers to action.

pillars.title: Clarity over noise
pillars.description: We strip away weak messaging and clutter so your business communicates value faster and more clearly.

pillars.title: Design with purpose
pillars.description: Every visual choice should support trust, readability, and action rather than decoration without direction.

pillars.title: Growth-minded execution
pillars.description: We build digital systems that support real business goals like visibility, credibility, and better lead generation.

process: Discover the offer, audience, and strongest conversion angle
Design the brand and digital experience around that strategy
Build, refine, launch, and support the next growth step

testimonials.quote: The brand finally looked as strong online as it felt in real life.
testimonials.author: Business owner

testimonials.quote: Everything became clearer, cleaner, and easier for customers to trust.
testimonials.author: Founder

contact.headline: Let’s build a digital presence that customers notice and trust.
contact.description: Tell us what you need, from branding to websites to campaign content, and we will reply with the clearest next step for your business.
